project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis CLI + FastAPI dashboard
test_framework: pytest with click.testing.CliRunner for CLI, fastapi.testclient.TestClient for API
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ -x -q to confirm all tests pass (211+ tests expected)
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' && pip install fastapi uvicorn jinja2 httpx click pyyaml
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 default. No Docker daemon needed for tests.
contribution_requirements: All code must follow existing patterns. Tests required for new functionality.
key_patterns: CLI uses Click with @main.command decorators. API uses FastAPI with HTTPException for errors. Dashboard uses Jinja2 templates with Bloomberg dark theme. Error messages mix Chinese/English depending on context.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core Python package (cli, api, registry, personas, config, data, backtest, cron, bots). dashboard/ - FastAPI web app with templates/ and static/. tests/ - pytest test files. config/ - YAML configs.
